transcript: [chuckles] Hello! [pitch-down] Hi! [delay] How ya doin’ up ‘ere?
This is Longmont—[breaks up]—by the way.
We’re all—we’re all here for you, man! We’re—[breaks up]—here for you!
"For you"!? Thank you! We’re gonna have a little fun!
Hi, this [breaks up]. I’m unable to take your call right now—

Aw, yeah! We’re gonna just do a little this, a little of that! [exhales] If anybody has a phone number, ya know, kinda thing, please, ah, feel free to share that one time, real quick! Otherwise, I’m gonna be, ah, clickin’ away, here, and doin’ this and doin’ that!
—Heck yeah, man! You do it the only way you know how!—
Did anybody have any phone numbers they wanna [unclear]?
[crowd members shout over one another to provide phone numbers]
[sample of "7"][man speaks] I don't think she's talkin' very well tonight, here.
This is Percival. Uh, I just moved in, uh, next door. How ya doin’?

Yeah! Uh, hey, I—I’m a whipmaster. I got about a 28-foot horsewhip. I’m gonna be outside tomorrow morning, ah, practicing. I just wanna make sure you’re not gonna be outdoors. Just stay inside, if that would be okay, this one time. That’ll be alright with ya? [sharp inhale]
I don’t understand what you’re asking me.
I’m asking you to not be outside for your own safety, is what I’m asking you. Is that gonna be a problem or not a problem? [burps] [delay & pitch]
Uh, I guess, if it’s for my own safety, it shouldn’t be a problem.
I mean, are you feelin’ tough or…? I mean, I don’t want any liability on my hands. I got a 28-foot bullwhip spinnin’ around here, alright?
I don’t even know what that means!
—whip! It’s a—it’s a whopper of a whip! Ya know, I get this thing crackin’ through the air—
—Alright, I’m takin’ a dump right now. Call me back.
That was Mark, everybody! Gettin’ wild. Gettin’ tough! [exhales]
[Nate, an employee of O’Reilly’s Auto Parts, enters call]
This is O’Reilly’s Auto Parts in Waipahu.
Yeah, I need a new VIN number, like, uh, pronto. Can you guys hook me up? [exhales]
I need a new VIN number, like, immediately. It’s kind of—
—We do not give away VIN numbers! We don’t—we—we—we do not—maybe you have to go contact DMV or something, for that one, boss. Or the, um—
—I’m sorry, sir. I’m very busy. I don’t have time for you—for—for jokes, okay?
I’m gonna shove you around, here, okay? How’s that sound?
Thank you! That was a Hawaiian Auto Parts store
I—I guess they’re cutting us off, man!
[sample of "7" plays continually until track ends]

[continual layered, delay & pitch] Los Angeles, I love you! Thank you so much! Los Angeles, thank you so much! Thank you so very, very much indeed! For a wonderful night! Thank you! Good night! Good night! Thank you so very much! Goodnight! Goodnight! Night! Goodnight! Woo! [delay & pitch] Woo, woo—woo—woo—woo!—
[sample of "7"][man speaks] I don't think she's talkin' very well tonight, here.
